name: Knife Set + Block + Chopping Boards
description: A good knife set with a block, plus a couple of sturdy chopping boards for everyday cooking.

name: Le Creuset Pot
description: A Le Creuset (or similar) Dutch oven for slow cooking and everyday meals.

name: Instant Pot / Air Fryer + Rice Cooker
description: An Instant Pot or air fryer, and a rice cooker, for quick everyday cooking.

name: Fry Pans
description: A set of good quality fry pans in a couple of sizes.

name: Food Containers
description: A set of airtight food storage containers for the kitchen and fridge.

name: Money! Honeymoon / Start-up Funds
description: A cash contribution towards our honeymoon or setting up our home together.

name: Gaming Console + 2 Controllers
description: A current-gen console with two controllers for evenings in together.

name: Towel Sets & Bath Sheets
description: High quality towel sets and large bath sheets for the home.

name: Gift Cards (UK & India)
description: Gift cards we can actually use, ones that work in both the UK and India. Many high street vouchers are region-locked, so please check before buying. Honestly, cash is even easier for us.

name: Air Purifier
description: A good air purifier for the home.

name: Smart Home Devices
description: Smart home gadgets, Matter-compatible please, we'd rather not be locked into one ecosystem.

name: Luggage
description: A set of sturdy suitcases or travel bags for our trips together.

name: Hawkins Pressure Cooker
description: A Hawkins pressure cooker for everyday South Indian cooking.

name: Traditional Filter Coffee Machine
description: A good filter coffee machine or traditional South Indian filter coffee set.

name: Contribution to Our Home
description: If you'd like to give us a cash gift towards setting up our home, we'd be truly grateful. We'll put it towards something we'll use every day.
